themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 6 verses. Commentary leans on "How does confident anticipation of God's promised future strengthen your present obedience?". Word-study detail reinforces "יַֽעֲשׂ֥וּ: shall keep - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application".

themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse.
